certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys)
certificate.description: wolfCrypt module is a comprehensive suite of FIPS Approved algorithms. All key sizes and modes have been implemented to allow flexibility and efficiency.

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Zeroise
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: FreeRng_fi ps destroys RNG CSPs. All functions zeroise CSPs using function ForceZero (overwriting with zeros) within the function scope after use. Caller stack cleanup is the duty of the application. Restarting the general- purpose computer clears all CSPs in RAM.

extraColumns.From: EXT: Loaded from external entropy source

services.name: P1
services.description: Periodic method 1: Automatically by the module when algorithm is first invoked. CO may opt to invoke prior to first algorithm use to avoid delay at time of first operational use of an algorithm or at a later time manually.

services.name: P2
services.description: Periodic method 2: Automatically by the module during power on. CO may opt to invoke manually thereafter.

services.name: P3
services.description: Periodic method 3: Automatically during key generation service

services.name: P4
services.description: Automatically by the module upon first operational use of the DRBG algorithm. When an external entropy source is registered with the module by application level entropy callback function it is considered the first operational use of the DRBG. Does a periodic reseed every 1 million invocations, during the reseed the DRBG health test will be automatically executed.

services.name: FIPS_MODE_FAILED
services.description: Module has failed its software integrity check
services.roleAccess: HMAC- SHA2- 256 CAST Failure Module Integrity Check Failure

services.name: FIPS_CAST_STATE_F AILURE
services.description: One or more algorithm(s) are no longer usable and the module mode is set to FIPS_MODE_DEG RADED (2)
services.roleAccess: AES- CBC AES- GCM HMAC- SHA1 HMAC- SHA2- 256 HMAC- SHA2- 512 HMAC- SHA3- 256 RSA- PKCSv1 .5 DRBG ECC Diffie- Hellman
services.indicator: One or more algorithms CAST status values set to FIPS_CAST_STATE_F AILURE (3)

services.name: FIPS_MODE_DEGRA DED
services.description: One or more of the CASTS have failed anytime following a successful power on and integrity check. Upon entering this mode the module will automatically run all CASTS prior to the operational use of any cryptographic algorithm.

Periodic method 1: Automatically by the module when algorithm is first invoked. CO may opt to invoke prior to first algorithm use to avoid delay at time of first operational use of an algorithm or at a later time manually.
Periodic method 2: Automatically by the module during power on. CO may opt to invoke manually thereafter.
Periodic method 3: Automatically during key generation service

Automatically by the module upon first operational use of the DRBG algorithm. When an external entropy source is registered with the module by application level entropy callback function it is considered the first operational use of the DRBG. Does a periodic reseed every 1 million invocations, during the reseed the DRBG health test will be automatically executed.
